description: Generate variable-sized buffer zones around major cities based on their population in gvSIG. Using the Populated Places layer (/home/ga/gvsig_data/cities/ne_110m_populated_places.shp), create a new field named inf_deg (Double/Float) calculated as [POP_MAX] / 10000000. Generate individual, non-dissolved buffer polygons using the inf_deg field for the radius. Export the result to /home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/city_influence.shp.
